generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws leave dangerous gaps. The 2024 National Threat Assessment identified alarming patterns in domestic radicalization that our agencies can't fully address with existing tools. We need expanded powers to track and disrupt these networks before it's too late. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
